releaseImpact.cloudFunctions: Deploy collaboration-template and the updated admin, home-prefetch, post, and search/RAG consumers.
releaseImpact.adminWeb: Deploy global collaboration-template management and collaboration post filters.
releaseImpact.miniprogram: Upload the section-free collaboration publishing, listing, detail, edit, and delete flows.
databaseMigrations: After the formal release smoke succeeds, run migrate:global-collaboration --prepare and the reviewed --apply from the clean canonical main workspace; do not run the destructive migration inside the pre-deploy release stage.
